intended_use: The SpineUs™ system is a software-based, tracked, ultrasound imaging system and accessories, intended for diagnostic imaging. It is indicated for diagnostic ultrasound imaging in the following applica
intended_use_full: The SpineUs™ system is a software-based, tracked, ultrasound imaging system and accessories, intended for diagnostic imaging. It is indicated for diagnostic ultrasound imaging in the following applications: musculoskeletal (conventional, superficial). The system is intended for use by trained chiropractors and radiologists in a hospital or medical clinic. The SpineUs™ system is intended for assisting trained chiropractors and radiologists in acquiring, viewing, and measuring ultrasound images of the spine in both clinic and hospital settings.
target_condition: Spinal abnormalities (particularly scoliosis as evidenced by clinical testing comparing scoliosis angle measurements)
ground_truth: For non-clinical segmentation metrics: expert annotations reviewed by separate annotators, with corresponding thoracic CT imaging serving as ground truth when available. For clinical performance testing: X-ray-based measurements of scoliosis angle
other_metrics: Precision: 38.70%; Dice Coefficient: 0.4019; Balanced Accuracy: 70.49%; 95th Percentile Hausdorff Distance: 12.91 mm; Average Percentage of Transverse Processes Identified: 100.0% [100.0% - 100.0%]; Average Inference Time: 140.05 frames per second (success criterion >25 fps); Clinical Performance: Average error (absolute value of difference between SpineUs and X-ray measurements) for scoliosis angle across all patients: 2.81 mm (95% CI: 2.36-3.25)
